mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE deleted_date IS NULL

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.product_category_id AS category_id, pc.name AS category_name, p.price, p.stock, p.image_url, p.rating, p.review_count, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.calories, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS calories, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.protein, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS protein, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.carbs, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS carbs, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.fat, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS fat FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON p.product_category_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN food f ON p.food_id = f.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted_date IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products ( user_id, product_category_id, name, description, price, weight_g, stock, image_url, rating, review_count, food_id ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{weightG}, #{stock}, #{imageUrl}, 0.0, 0, #{foodId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET review_count = review_count + 1 WHERE id = #{productId} AND deleted_date IS NULL

UPDATE products
name = #{name}, product_category_id = #{categoryId}, price = #{price}, description = #{description},
weight_g = #{weightG},
stock = #{stock}, image_url = #{imageUrl}
WHERE id = #{productId} AND deleted_date IS NULL
UPDATE products SET deleted_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{productId} AND deleted_date IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stock, p.image_url, p.product_category_id AS category_id, pc.name AS category_name, p.rating, p.review_count, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.calories, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS calories, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.protein, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS protein, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.carbs, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS carbs, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.fat, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS fat FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON p.product_category_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN food f ON p.food_id = f.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_date IS NULL ORDER BY p.created_date DESC

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stock, p.image_url, p.product_category_id AS category_id, pc.name AS category_name, p.rating, p.review_count, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.calories, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS calories, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.protein, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS protein, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.carbs, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS carbs, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.fat, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS fat FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON p.product_category_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN food f ON p.food_id = f.id WHERE p.deleted_date IS NULL ORDER BY p.rating DESC, p.review_count DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stock, p.image_url, p.product_category_id AS category_id, pc.name AS category_name, p.rating, p.review_count, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.calories, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS calories, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.protein, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS protein, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.carbs, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS carbs, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.fat, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS fat FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON p.product_category_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN food f ON p.food_id = f.id WHERE p.deleted_date IS NULL ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stock, p.rating, p.review_count, p.image_url, p.product_category_id AS category_id, pc.name AS category_name, f.name AS food_name, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.calories, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS calories, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.protein, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS protein, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.carbs, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS carbs, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.fat, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS fat, p.user_id AS seller_id, p.created_date, p.modified_date, p.deleted_date FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON p.product_category_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN food f ON p.food_id = f.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stock, p.rating, p.review_count, p.image_url, p.product_category_id AS category_id, pc.name AS category_name, f.name AS food_name, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.calories, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS calories, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.protein, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS protein, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.carbs, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS carbs, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.fat, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS fat, p.user_id AS seller_id, p.created_date, p.modified_date, p.deleted_date FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON p.product_category_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN food f ON p.food_id = f.id WHERE p.modified_date > #{lastSyncTime} OR p.created_date > #{lastSyncTime} ORDER BY p.modified_date ASC

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stock, p.rating, p.review_count, p.image_url, p.product_category_id AS category_id, pc.name AS category_name, f.name AS food_name, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.calories, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS calories, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.protein, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS protein, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.carbs, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS carbs, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(CAST(NULLIF(f.fat, '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * p.weight_g / 100, 0) AS SIGNED), 0) AS fat, p.user_id AS seller_id, p.created_date, p.modified_date, p.deleted_date FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON p.product_category_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN food f ON p.food_id = f.id WHERE p.deleted_date IS NULL ORDER BY p.id ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
